sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Inspect current state and segmentation
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Step:", current_frame.step)
print("State:", last_action_result.get('state'))
print("game_over:", last_action_result.get('game_over'))
print("level_completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))

# Get key object info
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['id'] in [0, 1, 2, 16, 62, 17, 63]:
        print("Node %d: color=%s, pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (node['id'], node['color'], node['pixels'], node['boundary']))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
